title: Thandruss

'''Thandruss''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Thand sector/Legends|Thand sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Krytollak]]s, [[Endothermy|warm-blooded]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] with hard outer shells. Krytollaks had a society consisting of a worker class and a royal class and were ruled by a global [[Thandruss government|absolute monarchy]].

By the [[Time/Legends|time]] Thandruss was discovered by the wider [[galactic community]], the level of Krytollak technology had reached early steam power. Thandruss became a part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and the entire Krytollak [[Species/Legends|species]] came to worship [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

==Description==
Thandruss was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GG12" /> located in the [[Star system/Legends|star system]] of the [[Thandruss system/Legends|same name]], a part of the [[Thand sector/Legends|Thand sector]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was a terrestrial world [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by two [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. [[Carbon/Legends|Carbon]]-based rocks and [[Coal/Legends|coal]] were present on the planet. The [[Plant/Legends|flora]] of Thandruss included [[Tree/Legends|trees]] and [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetables]], and the world was also populated by [[Species/Legends|animals]] that were used by the primitive [[Krytollak]] society to draw [[Wagon/Legends|wagons]].<ref name="GG12" />

==History==
By the [[Time/Legends|time]] Thandruss was discovered by the [[galactic community]], the native Krytollaks were a technologically primitive society. They employed animal-drawn wagons for transportation and [[Fire/Legends|burned]] wood and coal for [[Temperature/Legends|heat]] and energy necessary for early steam-powered technology. The Krytollak settlements also utilized rudimentary [[radionics]] broadcasts to stay informed on global events, and the natives measured time by the orbits of Thandruss's moons. Throughout their entire history, the Krytollaks had always been ruled by a single absolute [[Monarchy/Legends|monarch]].<ref name="GG12" />

Not long before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] was fought between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Thandruss became a part of the Empire. [[Devir]], the Krytollak [[Emperor/Legends|empress]] who had reigned for twenty [[Standard year/Legends|years]], recognized [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] as her superior and allied the entire Krytollak species with the Empire. Through the interstellar [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] that followed Thandruss's integration into the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] society, the Krytollaks rapidly advanced their own level of technology. Eventually, with the permission of the ruling [[Noble/Legends|nobles]] of Thandruss, many Krytollaks left their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] for the wider [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. Over time, a few [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] owners in [[Star/Legends|star]] systems near Thandruss became apprehensive whenever Krytollaks entered their establishments due to the species' penchant for brawling and becoming vengeful when successfully provoked and offended.<ref name="GG12" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Main|Krytollak}}
[[File:Krytollak-GG12.png|thumb|right|200px|Thandruss was the homeworld of the Krytollaks.]]
Thandruss was the homeworld of the Krytollaks, a species of [[Endothermy|warm-blooded]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] that had both a hard internal [[Skeleton/Legends|skeleton]] and a tough outer shell consisting of multiple plates. Krytollaks were [[Diet/Legends|vegetarian]] but also consumed rocks in order to absorb trace elements necessary for the growth of their shells. The Thandruss natives considered both plants and rocks imported from other worlds to be [[Foodstuff/Legends|delicacies]].<ref name="GG12" />

Krytollaks had a rigid social structure made up of two classes: the worker class, to which more than 96 percent of the planet's population belonged, and the royal class, which constituted the [[Thandruss government|government]] that had authority over the entirety of the Krytollak homeworld. The model of [[Politics/Legends|governance]] was that of an absolute monarchy, with [[Gender/Legends|Empress]] Devir reigning by the time of the Galactic Civil War.<ref name="GG12" />

However, the ultimate figure of Krytollak worship was the Galactic Emperor, and as a result, the Thandruss government was a staunch supporter of the Galactic Empire. The latter had a presence on Thandruss that included a local Imperial [[Advisor/Legends|advisor]], and the Empire demanded an increased amount of tribute and tax revenue from the Krytollaks, whose admiration for the Emperor did not extend to the Imperial [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucracy]]. However, the [[Robe/Legends|robes]] worn by Krytollaks on Thandruss did imitate the [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] of [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] and aristocrats.<ref name="GG12" />

==Locations==
Before their civilization made contact with the wider galaxy, the Krytollaks of Thandruss created primitive roads on their homeworld. By the time Thandruss was a part of the Galactic Empire, Krytollak population centers on the planet included small communities and villages. Each Krytollak noble ruled over their own section of Thandruss.<ref name="GG12" />

==Behind the scenes==
Thandruss was created by [[Harry Heckel]] and introduced in ''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG12" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Thandruss system, and therefore the planet Thandruss, in grid square J-15.<ref name="TEA" />
